Title: MemorySmith.Agent — CI Baseline and Test Setup
Content:
CI uses GitHub Actions with a single build-and-test job on ubuntu-latest. Test framework: NUnit 4.6.1, NUnit3TestAdapter 6.2.0, Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk 18.6.0, coverlet.collector 10.0.1, GitHubActionsTestLogger 2.4.1. ci.runsettings activates the GitHub Actions logger.

Baseline: 48+ tests passing, 0 failures. Test categories: domain models (7), memory gateway (7), tool engine (4), world adapter (6), planner + goals (15+), integration (6).

Sandbox NuGet issue: dotnet restore fails with proxy 407 for new packages. Fix: (1) start authproxy.py on port 9081; (2) override BOTH HTTPS_PROXY and https_proxy (lowercase) to http://127.0.0.1:9081; (3) if packages still missing, use Python to download .nupkg files and create .sha512 files manually in ~/.nuget/packages.

Coverlet workaround: locally, XPlat Code Coverage shows 'Unable to find datacollector' but tests still pass (exit 0). On CI, coverlet.collector 10.0.1 resolves this. Do NOT use coverlet.collector 6.0.4 (doesn't exist on NuGet).
